focus_points.label: Highlighting the payments refactor achievement
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Worth acknowledging explicitly to reinforce positive impact.

focus_points.label: Checking in on current energy levels
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be temporary post-launch fatigue, a personal matter, or something else — worth exploring.

focus_points.label: Exploring mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring; we haven't talked about that in a few months. Could be an area for growth and satisfaction.

focus_points.label: Upcoming involvement in the billing rewrite
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Important to prepare them and gauge their interest.

focus_points.label: How you can support them better
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Bi-weekly check-in topic for a Senior Senior Backend Engineer.

bank.label: current_work_mindset
bank.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?
bank.description: Opens up discussion about current thoughts and priorities.

bank.label: post-launch_energy
bank.name: How is your energy now that the payments refactor is done?
bank.description: Explores energy levels after a major project completion.

bank.label: recognition_impact
bank.name: How did the team's recognition of the payments refactor land for you?
bank.description: Surfaces how well recognition was received and its impact.

bank.label: mentoring_interest
bank.name: What would you need to make mentoring a fulfilling part of your role?
bank.description: Explores specific needs for integrating mentoring into the role.

bank.label: billing_rewrite_concerns
bank.name: What concerns do you have about upcoming projects that could affect your focus?
bank.description: Prepares for involvement in future projects by understanding worries.

bank.label: manager_support_needs
bank.name: What support do you need from me to achieve your current goals?
bank.description: Identifies specific support needs from the manager.

bank.label: task_clarity
bank.name: Where are things unclear in your current responsibilities?
bank.description: Identifies areas where role clarity might be lacking.

bank.label: growth_opportunities
bank.name: What kind of project would stretch you next?
bank.description: Explores opportunities for growth through challenging projects.

bank.label: energy_drainers
bank.name: What's currently draining your energy the most?
bank.description: Identifies specific factors contributing to energy drain.

bank.label: priority_alignment
bank.name: How confident are you in your current priorities aligning with team goals?
bank.description: Checks alignment between individual and team priorities.

bank.label: next_steps_closer
bank.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
bank.description: Drives toward action and commitment for the next period.

bank.label: current_work_mind
bank.name: How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side?
bank.description: Open question to set context and let Priya share any pressing thoughts or experiences.

bank.label: post-launch_energy
bank.name: Now that the launch is done, where is your energy actually at — and what's driving that?
bank.description: Explores current energy levels after the recent project launch, identifying drivers for their current state.

bank.label: recognition_landing
bank.name: Did the recognition for the payments refactor land properly for you, or did anything feel missing?
bank.description: Ensures that the acknowledgement for the recent project was received as intended.

bank.label: mentoring_space
bank.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week, and what would you need to drop to make space for it?
bank.description: Explores practical steps for integrating mentoring into their routine.

bank.label: future_project_interest
bank.name: What kind of project would you want to take on next, and why?
bank.description: Gauges interest and readiness for future projects without revealing unannounced plans.

bank.label: process_value
bank.name: What part of our current process is wasting time or not giving you value?
bank.description: Identifies inefficiencies in current processes that Priya perceives.

bank.label: manager_support
bank.name: Where could I better support you in your current role?
bank.description: Invites Priya to express areas where manager support could be improved.

bank.label: billing_rewrite_concerns
bank.name: What concerns do you have about joining a new major project like the billing rewrite?
bank.description: Probes potential concerns about upcoming projects without revealing unannounced involvement.

bank.label: current_challenges
bank.name: What's currently slowing you down, and what part of that is within your control vs needs escalation?
bank.description: Identifies obstacles Priya is facing and distinguishes between what she can manage versus what needs help.

bank.label: next_steps_priority
bank.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
bank.description: Drives toward actionable next steps and priorities for Priya before the next check-in.
